title: Trump’s Defense Department Sees Growing Espionage Threat From Israel
description: The Defense Department has increased the counterintelligence threat assessment to its highest level, and Israel is believed to have eavesdropped on American negotiations with Iran.
author: Julian E. Barnes and Eric Schmitt

title: 5 Unsung Heroes Who Carried the Memory of D-Day
description: A journalist, a medic, a weather forecaster, a Medal of Honor recipient, a French commando: Their efforts showed that courage transcends race, class and gender.
author: Amisha Padnani and Ash Wu

title: Police Remove Diabetes Experts From Conference for Distributing Critique of Trump Administration
description: Several of those escorted out were scheduled to present at the American Diabetes Association conference this weekend.
author: Dani Blum

title: Escape From Trumpism
description: The best pathway out is to make Congress great again.
author: Jamelle Bouie

title: ICE Says Detainees Are ‘Worst of the Worst.’ Government Data Disagrees.
description: Federal officials said they are removing killers and rapists from the streets. Data obtained by The New York Times indicates most detainees at a Newark facility haven’t been convicted of crimes.
author: Ed Shanahan and Hamed Aleaziz

title: The Priests Revered in the Land of Five Genders
description: The bissus of South Sulawesi are considered a link between the earthly and celestial because they are thought to embody both male and female traits.
author: Sui-Lee Wee, Hasya Nindita and Nyimas Laula

title: Raphael Warnock Says the Supreme Court Has Done ‘Violence’ to Democracy
description: The Democrat from Georgia on what he sees as the moral issues of our time.
author: David Marchese

title: The White House’s Latest Provocation Is Way More Than Just a Troll
description: What’s the matter, can’t you take a joke?
author: M. Gessen

title: Melinda French Gates: Women, We Deserve Better Than This
description: Too many women walk out of their doctors’ office with no diagnosis, no treatment and no plan.
author: Melinda French Gates

title: Trump Says Bill Pulte, His New Intelligence Director, Should Slash Staff
description: The president suggested that employees who worked for previous Democratic presidents were among those who should be fired.
author: Maggie Haberman

title: First U.S. Screwworm Case Since 1960s Prompts Texas Emergency Response
description: The infections are the first detected in the United States since the 1960s. Officials are aggressively trying to prevent the parasite from spreading in the nation’s largest cattle-producing state.
author: Edgar Sandoval

title: Anthony Head, ‘Buffy the Vampire Slayer’ and ‘Ted Lasso’ Actor, Dies at 72
description: The British actor was a mainstay of influential television shows who first found fame as a Nescafe pitchman.
author: Sopan Deb

title: It’s No Wonder Grads Are Booing Their Commencement Speakers
description: Companies are trying to automate graduates’ futures away. No wonder they’re furious.
author: Molly Jong-Fast

title: Trump Has Become What He Feared
description: “Trump loses more often, on more things, than most.”
author: Jonathan Bernstein and John Guida

title: The Betrayal of Black Voters Threatens Our Democracy
description: The sweeping effort to dismantle Black-majority congressional districts in the South will have far-reaching consequences for all Americans, and for our democracy.
author: Mara Gay

title: In a First, Scientists Precisely Edit Human Embryo Genes
description: Researchers relied on a newer gene-editing technique that may make it possible to engineer embryos, a prospect that has long alarmed bioethicists.
author: Carl Zimmer

title: Granted Clemency by Trump, Scores of Jan. 6 Rioters Have Been Accused of New Crimes
description: At least 97 of those who were charged in connection with the Capitol riot have reoffended in the years since the attack, the nonprofit publication Lawfare has found.
author: Luke Broadwater

title: From Cow-Milking Robots to Weed-Zapping Lasers, Farmers Are Embracing A.I.
description: We asked three farmers to tell us how new technology is revolutionizing the way they work.
author: Coralie Kraft and Spencer Lowell

title: House Passes Iran War Powers Resolution in Bipartisan Rebuke to Trump
description: A measure to direct an end to U.S. engagement in Iran was adopted with a handful of Republicans in support, sending a signal of opposition to the president’s handling of the war.
author: Robert Jimison and Megan Mineiro

title: This Man Should Not Be in Charge of National Intelligence
description: Pulte’s one evident qualification is his eagerness to advance the president’s political revenge campaign.
author: The Editorial Board
